reference: Not to worry much, as this is a benign condition like an infected sebaceous cyst leading to abscess formation. If it really worries you, you can go for a fine needle aspiration test for confirmation. All the best!
text: Not to worry much as this is a benign condition like an infected sebaceous cyst leading to abscess formation. If it really worries you, you can go for a fine needle aspiration test for confirmation. All the best!
